zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Dutton於1425年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，她的父親Sir John Dutton36歲，母親Margaret Savage, Lady Audley20歲。她於1443年與Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire在英國爾達頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1489年在英國爾達頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國爾達頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Dutton于1425年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，她的父亲Sir John Dutton36岁，母亲Margaret Savage, Lady Audley20岁。她于1443年与Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire在英国爾達頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1489年在英国爾達頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Dutton was born in 1425, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Dutton, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, was 20. She married Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire in 1443, in Dutton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1489, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Dutton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Dutton est née en 1425, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Dutton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire en 1443, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1489, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Dutton 1425 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Dutton 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Savage, Lady Audley 20. Sie hat 1443 in Dutton, Cheshire, England Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1489 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Dutton, Cheshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Duttonが1425年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir John Duttonは36歳，母Margaret Savage, Lady Audleyは20歳であった。1443年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンでSir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1489年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで64歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアダットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Dutton(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Dutton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Savage, Lady Audley(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1443년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1489년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 드턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire em 1443, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Dutton родилась в 1425 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Dutton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire в 1443 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1489 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire en 1443, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1489, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
